instructions: Resolve every required input before side effects.
Stop when a required capability is denied, unsupported, or awaiting approval.
Stay within the project or an explicitly approved artifact root.
Preserve the named output contract and report skipped validation honestly.
Execute only declared workflow effects after satisfying their authorization states (shell:prompt, workspace-read:preapproved); authorization alone never expands effect scope.

behaviorContract.purpose: Package completed work into review-ready handoff text without changing the completed state.

inputs.name: WORK_SUMMARY
inputs.description: Completed changes and validation context; current task context may satisfy it explicitly.

when.condition: The workspace is a Git repository.

decisionTable.action: Produce a conventional commit message and PR description.

when.condition: The workspace is not a Git repository.

decisionTable.action: Produce a local change summary and manual handoff steps.

invariants: Mark follow-up items out of scope.
Do not claim skipped validation passed.
stopConditions: DEPTH is not an exact allowed value.
Workspace evidence is insufficient to distinguish completed, skipped, and blocked validation.
A requested action would publish or mutate the workspace.

workflowSteps.action: Freeze the current completed state and resolve DEPTH.
Detect Git availability using permitted read-only inspection.
Verify all mandatory fields and validation truthfulness.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not edit files, commit, push, publish, or add implementation during finalization.

fields.name: validation
fields.description: Actual passed, failed, skipped, and blocked checks.

fields.name: handoff
fields.description: PR description or manual delivery steps.

validation: Confirm workspace mode was actually detected or clearly unavailable.
Confirm every completion and validation claim has evidence.

claimBoundary: Behavior-complete machine-readable contract generated from the canonical behavior IR. Workflow-level effects are authoritative; behaviorContract.effects declares the validated empty subset and cannot expand workflow capability scope. The referenced authored guidance surface may add explanatory context but cannot override this contract.
